features: Providing cavity protection and strengthening enamel
Colgate Fluorigard Fluoride Rinse Mouthwash is Alcohol Free
Contains fluoride to make enamel more resistant to acid attacks, prevent mineral loss and promote remineralisation of early decay
Protect your teeth from acid attacks caused by sugars in food and drinks
description: Product Description Prevent tooth decay for strong healthy teeth and smiles with Colgate FluoriGard Daily Rinse Mouthwash. This alcohol free cavity protection mouthwash has been clinically proven to prevent dental caries, or tooth decay. The mouthwash for tooth decay contains fluoride to help protect your teeth from acid attacks caused by sugars in food and drinks. What’s more, the fluoride mouthwash reduces the formation of plaque acids, prevents mineral loss caused by plaque acids and promotes the remineralisation of early decay. Make sure you keep your teeth strong, healthy and protected with Colgate FluoriGard Daily Rinse Mouthwash Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitol, Poloxamer 407, Sodium Phosphate, Sodium Benzoate, Dsodium Phosphate, Aroma, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Cinnamal, CI 19140, CI 42053 Directions 1. After brushing your teeth, take a small mouthwash in your mouth. 2. Move for about 30 seconds. 3. Spit out. 4. Do not swallow. 5. Use for daily oral hygiene. Safety Warning Do not swallow, Avoid contact with eyes, If ingested, seek medical attention immediately Box Contains 1 x Colgate Fluorigard Alcohol Free Mouth Rinse 400 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ. See more
